text_original: bullying – cyberbullying is rooted in  relationships, in how people interact in  everyday life. As for young people, since  they spend a lot of time in social media,  their interaction – good, bad or neutral –  happens in apps, texts, games and sites too.  CONNECTSAFELY.ORG | 1 If you want to talk with kids about “cyberbullying,” it might be best not to use that term  – at least not at first. Kids often use other terms, like “drama” to describe a range of  behaviors that don’t necessarily fit into adult perceptions or a scholarly definition. text_simplified: التنمر الإلكتروني هو استخدام الإنترنت لتوجيه الإساءات والتلميحات غير اللائقة ضد شخص ما. يمكن أن يكون شديدًا ويؤثر على الصحة النفسية والصحية الجسدية للأفراد أيضًا.
title: التنمر الإلكتروني وأثره النفسي والجسدي
